title: Annoyances
questions: What are some benefits of living in a city? Why are cities centers for culture? Why do new immigrants usually live in cities?
What are some drawbacks of living in a city? Would you prefer the country?
Name 3 things which annoy you. Why do those things annoy you? Who or what does the action? Can you avoid those annoying things? How?
What are some possible solutions to the annoying actions? Who should solve those problems? You? The local government?
What things about your country would bother tourists? Can you fix those things? Would more people visit if those things were fixed?
What annoys you when... You're travelling? You're at home? You're with friends? You're driving in a car?
